message:
fix: improve kubectl terminal output formatting for proper column alignment (#3653)

Use <pre> with whitespace-pre-wrap instead of <div> to preserve the column
alignment that kubectl's tabwriter produces. Add visual separators between
command runs, highlight command prompt lines with a green left border, and
give error output a red background tint for clarity.

Closes #3645

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
